case_title: DE FELICE FABIO VS PRICE CLUB

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DE FELICE FABIO AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
